spec.expr: 100 * sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_milliseconds_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider", outcome="success"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_milliseconds_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider"}[$__range])), 0.001)

spec.title: Money via banks: success vs potential loss

spec.expr: 100 * sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_milliseconds_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider", outcome="success"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_milliseconds_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider"}[$__range])), 0.001)

spec.title: How long a payment waits in queue

spec.expr: 100 * sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_value_total{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider", outcome="failed"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_value_total{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
